form.formComment: Resumes. Finished off last preparation when well beaten into sixth behind Leo Galleon at Maryborough over 1690m in a 2yo MAIDEN on November 2 at $21. Must be included.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into fourth behind Aldebaran Marcus at Shepparton over 1690m in a NR up to 50 on March 24 at $9.50. Then a handy effort when beaten by 5.5 m finishing second after being driven well back, behind Woman To Love at Bendigo over 1650m in a 0-1 WIN on April 1 at $3.40. Heading the right way and is a leading contender.

form.formComment: Comes here in the right form. Won by 8 m as favourite when quickly away, (Fr4) at this track (2:51.90) beating Gatesys Mate in 0-1 WIN on April 10 at $1.35 at the bell was leading 4.95. Two runs back 2nd (Fr2) over 1720m after showing early speed at this track, at the bell was leading 3.7 beaten a nose by Farrokh (2:05.60) in 0W/15 0K stake on March 28 at $6. Facing a more difficult assignment this time.

Genuine chance.
